subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! Thou seest how the soul is convulsed in agony, the breast laboureth to draw breath, the heart is constricted, and the spirit is stilled by that which hath been cut off [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی ترانی قد تغرغر النفس و حشرج الصدر و ضاق القلب و همد الروح بما انقطع
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @spiritual transformation, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation
